# js-snippets

Reusable ES modules served via GitHub Pages. Source is TypeScript + WGSL,
built to plain JS by esbuild. Import directly by URL — no bundler needed.

Base URL: https://wow-look-at-my.github.io/js-snippets

## Modules

### math/vec3.js
Minimal vec3 utilities. All functions return new arrays, no mutation.

Exports: create, add, subtract, scale, dot, cross, length, normalize
Type: Vec3 = [number, number, number]

### math/mat4.js
Minimal mat4 utilities. Column-major Float32Array(16). Imports vec3 internally.

Exports: create, identity, perspective, lookAt, multiply, translate, rotateX,
  rotateY, scale, reflectY, invert
Type: Mat4 = Float32Array

Note: perspective() uses WebGPU clip-Z [0,1] convention.

### webgpu/hdr-loader.js
Parses Radiance RGBE (.hdr) files. Supports new-style RLE scanlines.

Exports: loadHDR(url: string) → Promise<{ width, height, data: Float32Array }>
  Returns 4 floats per pixel (RGBA), suitable for rgba32float textures.

### webgpu/mip-generator.js
AMD Single Pass Downsampler for WebGPU. Generates a full mip chain in two
compute dispatches (box-filter average). WGSL shader is embedded at build time.

Exports: generateMips(device: GPUDevice, texture: GPUTexture, mipCount?: number) → void
  Texture must be rgba32float with COPY_DST usage. Mip 0 must be populated.
  mipCount defaults to texture.mipLevelCount.

### webgpu/env-prefilter.js
IBL environment map prefiltering with GGX importance sampling and Hammersley
sequence. Generates roughness-based mip chain where each level is convolved
with a GGX specular lobe. Use with split-sum approximation for PBR.

Exports: prefilterEnvMap(device: GPUDevice, texture: GPUTexture, numSamples?: number) → void
  Mip 0 = sharp (roughness 0), mip N = fully diffuse (roughness 1).
  numSamples defaults to 1024. Higher = better quality, slower.
  Sample with: textureSampleLevel(tex, sampler, uv, roughness * maxMip)

### webgpu/geometry.js
Procedural mesh generators. Each returns { positions: Float32Array,
normals: Float32Array, indices: Uint16Array }.

Exports: createCube(size?), createSphere(radius?, segments?),
  createCylinder(radiusTop?, radiusBottom?, height?, segments?),
  createPlane(width?, depth?)

### webgpu/buffer.js
GPU buffer creation helper.

Exports: createBuffer(device: GPUDevice, data: ArrayBufferView, usage: GPUBufferUsageFlags) → GPUBuffer
  Creates a buffer pre-filled with data via mappedAtCreation.

### webgpu/context.js
WebGPU device + canvas context initialization.

Exports: initWebGPU(canvas: HTMLCanvasElement, features?: GPUFeatureName[])
  → Promise<{ device, ctx, format } | null>
  Returns null if WebGPU is unavailable. Features are only requested if
  the adapter supports them.

### webgpu/sky.js
Equirectangular HDRI sky renderer. Fullscreen triangle, no vertex buffer.
Includes Reinhard tonemapping.

Exports:
  createSky(device, format, hdriView, hdriSampler, depthFormat?) → Sky
  drawSky(pass, sky) → void
  Write invViewProj to sky.uniformBuffer before calling drawSky.

## Usage Example

```js
import { loadHDR } from 'https://wow-look-at-my.github.io/js-snippets/webgpu/hdr-loader.js';
import { generateMips } from 'https://wow-look-at-my.github.io/js-snippets/webgpu/mip-generator.js';
import * as mat4 from 'https://wow-look-at-my.github.io/js-snippets/math/mat4.js';
```
